violations.text: The tilt skillet was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The dishwasher was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Ceiling lights in the back cooking area, and hallway were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives in the knife rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The garage door to the outside, located in the loading dock near the dumpster, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The dishwasher was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. Facility is awaiting part for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The tilt skillet was not in good repair, with facility awaiting ignitor for repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of soil residue and debris: plate warmer tilt skillet drawers in the back cooking area rolling rack Portable air conditioner units have and accumulation of dust and debris. Fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and mold New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
The area around the dumpster, the cardboard recycling dumpster and metal outdoor stairway next to it have an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and trash. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

The floors especially in the walk in freezer, dry storage room, and beneath sealed pipe near the ice machine have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The ceiling in one walk in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026
One light in the back cooking area is in poor repair, nonfunctional during isnpection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
